import React, { useEffect } from "react"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; import "./HomePage.css"; import AOS from "aos"; import "aos/dist/aos.css"; export default function HomePage() { useEffect(() => { AOS.init({ duration: 1000 }); }, []); const scrollToTop = () => window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: "smooth" }); return (
🎓 CampusConnect
About Features Internships Placements Testimonials FAQ Contact Login Register
{/* Hero */}

Welcome to CampusConnect

Your gateway to campus resources, updates, and opportunities.

Login Register
{/* About */}

About

CampusConnect is a one-stop portal for students, admins, and HRs to manage everything from notes, placements to event listings and notices.

{/* Features */}

Features

  • 📚 Upload & View Notes
  • 📢 View College Notices
  • 🎯 Apply for Internships & Placements
  • 🎉 Discover Campus Events
  • 👨‍🏫 Role Based Dashboards
{/* Internship */}

Internship Opportunities

Browse and apply to internship opportunities shared by HRs & Admins.

View Internships
{/* Placement */}

Placement Drives

Explore upcoming placement opportunities and get hired by top companies.

View Placements
{/* Testimonials */}

What Users Say

"CampusConnect helped me apply to 3 internships easily. Super smooth!"

- Student

"Posting placement drives was never this simple. Love the platform!"

- HR

"Managing students and notices became effortless with this app."

- Admin, GLA
{/* FAQs */}

FAQs

  • Q: Who can register?
    A: Students, Admins & HRs.
  • Q: Can students post internships?
    A: No, only HR/Admins can.
  • Q: How are passwords secured?
    A: Stored securely in the local app (production uses backend).
{/* Contact */}

Contact Us

{/*

📍 GLA University, Mathura
📧 campusconnect@gla.ac.in

*/}
{/* Footer */}

© 2025 CampusConnect | All Rights Reserved
